# Transcrição: My_biggest_fear_(stand_up_comedy)

- **Fonte:** My_biggest_fear_(stand_up_comedy)
- **Duração:** 01:19
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:19]

One of the things that scared me more than anything in this world, and even though I'm a keynote speaker, I do public speaking for a living, the thing that scares me most is stand-up comedy. Nothing scares me more than a room filled with less than 10 people who are sitting there with the expectation that you're going to make them laugh. Gives me the heebie-jeebies. So a couple of years ago, I made the decision to face this fear. And I jumped on stage for a five-minute set and I tell you what, this was one of the scariest things I did in my life. But the moment I did it, and the moment I faced that fear, I started to add to the bank of evidence that I am a courageous person. And just by doing this, I now fear stand-up comedy even more. No, I'm kidding. I'm no longer scared of it. It doesn't frighten me as much before I was 10 out of 10 fearful. Now I'm about a six out of 10. It's not as scary anymore. And the more you start to do things like this, the more you start to build that bank of evidence that you are someone that's courageous, and as you start to get those badges and put them on yourself, you'll start to feel more confident.
